titleStmt.title: SII 40.218: original edition by K. Munirathnam
No. 218. (A.R. No. B. 263 of 1933.) Bhṛigubaṇḍa, Sattenapalle Taluk, Guntur District, Andhra Pradesh.

summary.p: On a stone set up in a field to the east of the village.

Records the gift of land for providing offerings to the god Nārāyaṇadēva at Bikkibaṇḍa in Pallinādu by Pennama Nāyaka and Kāma-Nāyaka of Taṅgaḍumpūṇḍi. Refers to the Teliki-1000 of Bejavāḍa, who built the Bikkibaṇḍa Nārāyaṇadēva temple.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti samadhigata pañca
mahāsabda mahā
maṇḍalēśvarayanēko
ttuṁggataraṁggasaṁggā
talavaṇōdadhivēlāva
layanalayitagaṁggā
pā¨ryyāṁta madhyadēsā
dhīsvaramavāsvatī pura
varēśvara naihayavaṁsō(śō)
dbhavanātrēyagōtrapa
vitranatyugranaraśira
da¨rppana dhvajamahāpe
ṟaghū¨rṣasaśrabāhu
pratāpavī¨ryyaguṇa
saṁpannulaina śrīmanmahā
maṇḍalēśvara rājarāja
dēvaṇḍanu bētarājunu
nuttarāyana nimityamuna
sakhavaruṣamulu 1040

śrīhita
ṁggaḍuṁbū
ṇḍupenna
manāya
kuṇḍunu
kāmanāya
kuṇḍunu
bikkiba
ṇḍanuṇḍu
gāṁballi
nāṁṭilōna
bikkiba
ṇḍanārāya
nadēvaraku
nivēdyamu
naku nēṭi
tū¨rppuna

yēnuvuṭla yāḍla
paṭṭu yācaṁdratā
rakamugā nicciti
mi yi bhūmina
ḍapanivāru gaṁgga
kaṟutavēyigavi
lalavadhiṁccinavāru
śrīmadcāḷukyarājyamū
lastaṁbāyamānulu sa
tyasanthānulu gurudēvapā
dārādhakulu parahita
sādhakulu kapilama
ṭhastānapraddhitulu
cagamatilabdavaraprasā
dakulu kavigamakapā
ṭi vāḍinaṭanagnadīnā
nāthapaṇḍitajanasamu
ddharulu nayōdyāpura
viprānvayabhrityulu

sa¨rvvalō
kāśraya
janastutyu
laina śrīma
tu beja
vāḍa telki
dēvuraku
satōṣa
mugā ja
kki seṭṭi veṭṭi
nkabikkiba
ṇḍanārāya
nadēvaraku
guḍi Etti
cekulapra
vitruṇḍai
svastivannā
kuḍivēma
navalli vi
ṣṇunaku da
sāvatāraṁ
